header: From idea to published page in four steps
subheadline: A predictable workflow your whole team can follow, no developer required after setup.

items.title: Pick a block
items.description: Choose from a library of ready-made sections built for common page goals.

items.title: Fill the fields
items.description: Add your copy and media in a guided form with sensible limits and hints.

items.title: Preview live
items.description: Watch the frontend update as you type, so there are no surprises at publish.

items.title: Publish
items.description: Go live in one click. The block stays accessible and on-brand by default.
